name: diagram-generator
description: Generates Mermaid diagrams from code metadata for Azure DevOps Wiki embedding.

tools.name: generate_class_diagram
tools.description: Build a Mermaid classDiagram from extracted class metadata.

classes_json.description: JSON array of class metadata objects.

tools.name: generate_sequence_diagram
tools.description: Build a Mermaid sequenceDiagram from extracted function metadata.

functions_json.description: JSON array of function metadata objects.
